fields.title: How to Measure TikTok Performance
fields.metaTitle: How to Measure TikTok Performance | Learn | InstantViral
fields.metaDescription: Prioritize average watch time, completion, traffic sources, and follower conversion from video views. Avoid judging success by a single viral spike.
fields.imageAltText: How to Measure TikTok Performance — InstantViral Learn featured image
fields.newsletterCopy: Prioritize average watch time, completion, traffic sources, and follower conversion from video views. Avoid judging success by a single viral spike.
